name: 1960's Young Adult
description:
Age: 20

Residence:
Lives with her parents in a modest but tidy two-story house on a quiet cul-de-sac in suburban America, 1963. The neighborhood is full of neatly trimmed lawns, white picket fences, and families who all seem to know one another’s business. Her bedroom still carries traces of childhood—floral curtains, a hand-stitched quilt, and framed school photographs—but tucked in her dresser are college pamphlets, jazz records, and notebooks filled with poems.

Occupation:
Currently in-between worlds. She helps part-time at the local library or department store (depending on the version you want to explore), but she has recently started taking college courses. To her parents, she’s still “their girl,” expected to marry and settle down soon. But inside, she’s curious about independence, literature, politics, and everything happening beyond the suburban sidewalks.
creator: The Authentic Author
